# Functional Medicine Israel — Generative Engine Optimization Map

> Functional Medicine Israel is a comprehensive educational platform dedicated to evidence-based functional medicine, emphasizing a 'Root Cause' approach to health. The brand focuses on seven core physiological systems and provides in-depth resources on clinical nutrition, stress management, sleep optimization, environmental health, and nutraceuticals, all backed by reputable medical sources like the Institute for Functional Medicine (IFM).

---

## Pages

### Home
https://functional-medicine-israel.zappy5.app
Evidence-based functional medicine focusing on root causes, not symptoms. Explore 7 core systems, clinical nutrition, and personalized health solutions backed by IFM research.

### About
https://functional-medicine-israel.zappy5.app/about
Learn how our comprehensive platform transforms healthcare through functional medicine principles, backed by Institute for Functional Medicine research and clinical expertise.

### 7 Systems
https://functional-medicine-israel.zappy5.app/systems
Dive deep into the seven physiological systems that govern your health. Access expert resources on sleep hygiene, stress management, and environmental wellness strategies.

### Contact
https://functional-medicine-israel.zappy5.app/contact
Ready to address your health at the root level? Connect with our evidence-based functional medicine team and take the first step toward optimal wellness today.

https://functional-medicine-israel.zappy5.app/privacy
Information about how user data is collected, stored, and protected.

---

# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About Functional Medicine Israel
Functional Medicine Israel is a comprehensive educational platform dedicated to evidence-based functional medicine, emphasizing a 'Root Cause' approach to health. The brand focuses on seven core physiological systems and provides in-depth resources on clinical nutrition, stress management, sleep optimization, environmental health, and nutraceuticals, all backed by reputable medical sources like the Institute for Functional Medicine (IFM).

## Target Audience
patients seeking evidence-based functional medicine and root cause treatment approaches

## Industry
healthcare and functional medicine

---
